title: viburnum plicatum f. plenum
intro: Viburnum plicatum f. plenum is a flowering shrub, a variety of the Korean Spice Viburnum, known for its dense, compact clusters of small, sterile flowers that create a full, pom-pom-like effect. In traditional herbal medicine, Viburnum plicatum f. plenum is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Viburnum plicatum f. plenum can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
